    ParameterExtractor.extractAllParameters(ApigeeBundle bundle)
    Extracts all parameters from all policies in the bundle.

    Extracts all parameters for an operation from the bundle and flow.
    void

    Infers parameters from query conditions in flows.
    PathExtractor.PathExtractionResult
    PathExtractor.extractPaths(ApigeeBundle bundle)
    Extracts paths and operations from the bundle.

    SecurityExtractor.extractSecurity(ApigeeBundle bundle)
    Extracts all security schemes from the bundle.
